hook: Clarity is attractive when it is calm, not when it is heavy.
body: Directness works because it lowers ambiguity, but it stops working when it starts demanding reassurance.

hook: Men often think the answer to mixed signals is an even more intense wall of honesty.
body: Say what you mean in a proportionate way and leave space for the other person to meet you there.

body: A simple note that you enjoyed the date and want to see her again is stronger than a late-night emotional download.
